title: Exclude e2e/** from Vitest
acceptance_criteria: vitest config test.exclude array additionally contains 'e2e/**' (and '**/e2e/**' if needed) so Playwright *.spec.ts files in e2e/ are NOT collected by vitest
Existing exclude entries preserved; coverage exclude unaffected unless trivially mirrored
npm run test still runs the existing unit suite green and does not attempt to execute anything under e2e/
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
